candidate_summary: K-kindred LLM clusters of M_k agents each with intra-dense full-mesh; okpara spokesperson agreement-score selection per cluster; inter-kindred low-bandwidth council with kindred-size weighted-majority vote; umuada complementary parallel-track gender-balanced lambda-blend final.
content_words: K-kindred LLM cluster intra-dense communication mesh
okpara spokesperson agreement-score selection per cluster
inter-kindred low-bandwidth council K-spokesperson weighted vote

results.name: TalkHier
results.rationale: Hierarchical multi-agent structured comm; lacks kindred-cluster spokesperson weighted vote + umuada parallel-track.

results.name: Multi-Agent LLM Weight Assigners Spatial MCDM
results.rationale: Weighted multi-agent MCDM weights overlap weighted vote; no two-tier kindred topology.

results.name: AgentNet++ 3-Level Cluster-Head
results.rationale: 3-level cluster-head architecture closely parallels intra-dense cluster + spokesperson + council; missing umuada complementary track and Igbo grounding.

results.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration Survey
results.rationale: General survey; no specific kindred-spokesperson-umuada construct.

results.name: Multi-Agent Debate Factuality Reasoning
results.rationale: Flat debate; no clustered two-tier or weighted spokesperson vote.

results.name: Adaptive Heterogeneous MAD Education
results.rationale: Heterogeneous debate with role diversity; lacks kindred clustering.

results.name: MAD Judges Adaptive Stability
results.rationale: Judge-based aggregation differs from spokesperson council.

results.name: Social Laboratory Psychometric
results.rationale: Persona/psychometric multi-agent simulation; partial overlap with umuada persona class but no kindred-spokesperson two-tier governance.

decision_rationale: Only AgentNet++ (sem 0.75 / func 0.78) hits at threshold. Per step-10 rule, total_hits>=1 -> FAIL. Primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.92 / func 0.78-0.92; verifier at 1 hit; both agree on FAIL verdict though count diverges.
